description.value:
Prerequisite: Int 13. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Spider tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Spider, you gain +2 bonus to saves against poison and mind-affecting effects (resistance).
description.summary: Summon Spider tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Spiders; +2 bonus to saves against poison and mind-affecting effects (resistance) within 50 ft of summon.
